Site.tagline: Building fast products with React, Next.js and Node.js
Site.shortBio: Fullstack developer focused on the frontend. 10+ years shipping products — from design systems to realtime services.
bio: For over 10 years I've designed and built web products. My core expertise is frontend with React and Next.js, but I'm equally confident on the backend: API design, databases, infrastructure.
I love clean architecture, strict typing, and attention to UI detail: animation, accessibility, performance. I believe good UI is when the complex feels simple.
In my spare time I explore animation libraries, tinker with design tokens, and write about frontend.

Footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS and Motion.

Home.projectsDescription: A few case studies I'm proud of. The full list is on the projects page.
Home.ctaDescription: Open to interesting challenges, consulting, and long-term collaboration.

TechStack.title: Technology stack
TechStack.description: The tools I use in my work — from frontend to infrastructure.

description.react: A library for declarative component-based UI — the foundation of most modern SPAs and the base of the whole frontend stack.
description.nextjs: A React framework with SSR/SSG, file-based routing and server components — for fast, SEO-friendly production apps.
description.typescript: A typed layer over JavaScript: catches errors before runtime, powers autocomplete and makes refactoring safe.
description.javascript: The language of the web — runs in the browser and on the server. The base the entire frontend toolchain stands on.
description.redux: Predictable state management for complex client state with minimal boilerplate and great dev tooling.
description.tailwind: A utility-first CSS framework — build UI right in the markup, no file-switching and no dead CSS.
description.motion: An animation library for React: declarative transitions, gestures and layout animations that respect prefers-reduced-motion.
description.gsap: A professional animation engine for complex timelines, scroll effects and frame-precise control.
description.nodejs: A server-side JavaScript runtime — APIs, build tools and realtime services in the same language as the frontend.
description.express: A minimal web framework for Node.js — the fast way to stand up a REST API with flexible middleware.
description.postgresql: A powerful relational database with rich SQL, transactions and production-proven reliability.
description.prisma: A type-safe ORM for Node.js: a declarative schema, migrations and an auto-generated typed client.
description.mongodb: A document NoSQL database for flexible schemas and fast prototyping while the data shape is still evolving.
description.git: Version control — change history, branches and collaboration on code without the chaos.
description.docker: Containerization — a reproducible environment from local dev to production; “works on my machine” becomes “works everywhere”.
description.vite: A lightning-fast bundler and dev server on native ES modules: instant HMR and quick builds.
description.figma: An interface design and prototyping tool — the bridge between design and code where the design system lives.

where-is-pizza.summary: Realtime pizza delivery tracking: live courier map, order status over WebSocket.
description: A realtime delivery tracking service. Users watch the courier move on a map and see order statuses change without reloading the page.
A Next.js App Router client with server components for the initial load and a WebSocket channel for live updates. Order state lives in Zustand, server data in TanStack Query.
Special focus on optimistic updates and connection recovery: when the socket drops, the client re-fetches missed events and merges them into the store.

stream-service.summary: Streaming platform: catalog, player, subscriptions. Heavy client-side load.
description: The frontend of a streaming service: content catalog, HLS player, subscription and profile sections. Focused on list performance and smooth navigation.
React + Redux Toolkit / RTK Query as the server-state source, long-list virtualization, route-based code-splitting, prefetching of adjacent screens.
The design system is extracted into a separate package and reused across web and mobile apps.

design-system.summary: A UI kit and design tokens for several products. Storybook, automated package publishing.
description: A monorepo with a UI kit: a set of typed components, theme tokens, icons. Powers several products from a single source.
Storybook as a showcase and visual testing ground, Changesets for versioning and automated package publishing to npm.
Strict typing of the components' public API and contract tests so updates don't break consumer products.

task-flow.summary: Kanban boards with drag-n-drop, realtime collaboration, and offline mode.
description: A task management tool: boards, columns, cards with drag-n-drop, realtime collaborative editing.
Next.js + dnd-kit for dragging, Prisma over PostgreSQL, server actions for mutations, and an optimistic UI.
Offline mode on IndexedDB with later synchronization and conflict resolution when the network is restored.
